saudade.text: A tender longing for what is absent — Portuguese's flagship word.

cegonha.text: nh spells the /ny/ sound — a stork.

borboleta.text: b-r-b-l flutters like the thing it names — a butterfly.

abóbora.text: Stress on the third-to-last syllable (esdrúxula) — a pumpkin.

hipopótamo.text: Silent h and an accented ó — a hippopotamus, 'river horse'.

chaminé.text: ch spells /sh/, with an accented final é — a chimney.

guitarra.text: gu keeps the hard g, double r trills — a guitar.

xilofone.text: Here x sounds like /z/; x has four sounds in Portuguese.

coração.text: The ção nasal ending — heart; the warmth of the language.
